title: Let's build GPT: from scratch, in code, spelled out.
description: A 116-minute walk-through of building a decoder-only Transformer from scratch. Karpathy starts with ChatGPT's probabilistic text generation, traces back to the 2017 "Attention Is All You Need" paper, then implements every component step by step: tokenization, batching, the BPE vocabulary, the self-attention math, multi-head attention, the feed-forward block, residual connections, LayerNorm, dropout, and GPU-accelerated scaling. The result is a ~10M parameter model that can babble Shakespeare-like text — and a clear mental model for how GPT-3 (175B params, 300B tokens) scales the same architecture up by orders of magnitude.
